title: InfoWorld
body: InfoWorld (IW) is an American information technology media business that began as a monthly magazine in 1978, but transitioned to a Web publication in 2007. Having Macworld and PC World as its sister publications, it has been owned by Regent LP since 2025.
categories: Defunct computer magazines published in the United States
Monthly magazines published in the United States
Official website different in Wikidata and Wikipedia
